calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-24-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing specially for CACH, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant DIANE L. SCHLAGER.
Declaration of Angelica Martinez pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff CACH, LLC. and against Defendant DIANE L. SCHLAGER as follows:
Principal $9,642.80
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $1,300.00
Costs $375.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $11,317.80
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Set For Trial On Feb-24-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Elizabeth McDonald ESQ., 415-922-5939 special appearance for plaintiff CACH LLC moving. No other appearance.

Discussion, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; Request For Monetary Sanctions is granted and sanctions to be awarded to plaintiff in the amount of $602.50. Order signed in open court. Judge Pro Tem Elan Lambert, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D302)

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar May-22-2013 Denied
